list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Merge branch 'prabu_lms' of https://github.com/Ft-Trumio/JAVA_LMS_3_repo into Abhishek_lms
# Conflicts: # Frontend/lms-backend/.gitignore # Frontend/lms-backend/pom.xml # Frontend/lms-backend/src/main/java/com/trumio/lms/LoanManagementSystemApplication.java # Frontend/lms-backend/src/main/java/com/trumio/lms/config/SecurityConfig.java #
